name: Yangzhou Guangling District Taihe Rural Micro-finance Company Limited
summary: Yangzhou Guangling District Taihe Rural Micro-finance Company Limited, a rural micro-finance company, engages in granting loans to agriculture, rural areas, and farmers in the People's Republic of China. The company is involved in financial guarantees and other financial businesses, as well as acts as a financial institution agent. It serves small and medium-sized enterprises, microenterprises, and individual proprietors. The company was founded in 2008 and is headquartered in Yangzhou, the People's Republic of China.
